intro: Out in the dust, you and another scavenger reach for the same glinting find at the same moment. You both freeze.
title: The Scavenger's Pact
description: A big find, and two of you eyeing it. The other scavenger meets your gaze, hand near their Poke Balls. You can shake on a fair split and both walk away richer, or take it all - betray the pact and fight them for the whole haul.

1.label: Split it fairly
1.tooltip: (+) Shake on a fair share. No fight. A moderate cut of the find.
1.selected: You nod, and split the find down the middle. No trouble, no blood.

2.label: Take it all
2.tooltip: (-) Betray the pact and fight them. (+) Win to claim the whole haul.
2.selected: You go for it all. The other scavenger snarls and sends out their pack!

3.label: Walk away
3.tooltip: (-) Leave the find to the other scavenger. No cost.
3.selected: Not worth the fight. You leave them to it and move on.
